message:
test(cli): extend install test timeout for slow I/O

Why:
- The install flow touches the filesystem and can be slower on shared CI/runtime disks.
- A per-test timeout avoids false negatives without weakening the rest of the suite.

What changed:
- Added a 10s timeout to the custom project directory install test.

Outcome:
- Keeps jfp integration tests stable under slower disk conditions.
